records.question: Which events held at Marathon on 13 October 2008 had an attendance of at least 6650 and were covered by journalists with exactly 3 years of experience writing Screening reports?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
JOIN news_report ON event.event_id = news_report.event_id
JOIN journalist ON news_report.journalist_id = journalist.journalist_id
WHERE journalist.years_working = 3 AND event.date = '13 October 2008' AND event.venue = 'Marathon' AND event.event_attendance >= 6650 AND news_report.work_type = 'Screening'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Event_ID FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN news_report AS T2 ON T1.Event_ID = T2.Event_ID INNER JOIN journalist AS T3 ON T2.journalist_ID = T3.journalist_ID WHERE T1.Venue = 'Marathon' AND T1.Date = '13 October 2008' AND T1.Event_Attendance >= 6650 AND T3.Years_working = 3 AND T2.Work_Type = 'Screening'

records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
WHERE event.date = '20 June 2018'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Event_ID FROM event WHERE Date = '20 June 2018'

records.question: What events named Olympia Games Openning took place at the venue Marathon?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
JOIN news_report ON event.event_id = news_report.event_id
WHERE event.venue = 'Marathon' AND event.name = 'Olympia Games Openning'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Event_ID FROM event WHERE Name = 'Olympia Games Openning' AND Venue = 'Marathon'

records.question: Which events named Global Awarding took place exactly on 20 June 2018?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
WHERE event.date = '20 June 2018' AND event.name = 'Global Awarding'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Event_ID FROM event WHERE Name = 'Global Awarding' AND Date = '20 June 2018'

records.question: Which events covered in news reports have an attendance of at most 6650?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
JOIN news_report ON event.event_id = news_report.event_id
WHERE event.event_attendance <= 6650
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.Event_ID FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN news_report AS T2 ON T1.Event_ID = T2.Event_ID WHERE T1.Event_Attendance <= 6650

records.question: Which events have attendance of at most 225 people?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
WHERE event.event_attendance <= 225
records.pred_sql: SELECT Event_ID FROM event WHERE Event_Attendance <= 225

records.question: Which Government Hearing events on 11 October 2007 had no more than 369 attendees and were covered by Jackie Waring, a journalist with at most 21 years working, writing music reports?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT event.event_id FROM event
JOIN news_report ON event.event_id = news_report.event_id
JOIN journalist ON news_report.journalist_id = journalist.journalist_id
WHERE event.event_attendance <= 369 AND event.name = 'Government Hearing' AND event.date = '11 October 2007' AND journalist.years_working <= 21 AND news_report.work_type = 'Music' AND journalist.name = 'Jackie Waring'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.Event_ID FROM event AS T1 INNER JOIN news_report AS T2 ON T1.Event_ID = T2.Event_ID INNER JOIN journalist AS T3 ON T2.journalist_ID = T3.journalist_ID WHERE T1.Name = 'Government Hearing' AND T1.Date = '11 October 2007' AND T1.Event_Attendance <= 369 AND T3.Name = 'Jackie Waring' AND T3.Years_working <= 21 AND T2.Work_Type = 'music reports'
